single_gpu.note: model state_dict + optimizer state + iter_num all bitwise-equal between A-path (train 10 -> save -> resume -> 10 more) and B-path (train 20 straight).

ddp_4rank.note: Two fresh DDP runs from same seed are bitwise-equal, so DDP training itself is deterministic across runs. Resume path produces ~2e-6 drift starting iter 12 after load. Per-rank state (RNG + seq_data_pos + X/Y) is captured correctly (iter 11 loss matches bitwise) but subsequent step weights diverge. Open investigation.

fixes_landed: per-rank RNG + seq_data_pos + prefetched X/Y via dist.all_gather_object
per-rank restore from _per_rank[rank] slot on resume
